page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. No local storage or GPU hardware is bundled with this instance type, and virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-threaded and multi-threaded capabilities. Single-core performance is relatively weak, with stress-ng single-core and single-threaded compression tasks like gzip and bzip3 scoring in the bottom 25% and 10% respectively. However, the 32 dedicated cores allow the instance to achieve average tier performance in multi-threaded workloads. Multi-core stress-ng, bzip3 decompression, and PassMark CPU tests all register in the middle 50% of benchmarked systems.

Memory performance is consistent, with cached and uncached read and write bandwidth benchmarks placing in the average tier. This balanced memory throughput supports database operations and Redis SET operations, which both perform at average levels. Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and the lack of local storage, this instance is qualitatively positioned as a compute-focused resource where multi-threaded processing is required but massive memory arrays or high single-core speeds are not critical. It is suitable for multi-threaded batch processing, web serving, and distributed database nodes.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge is an x86_64 compute-focused server instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz and 64.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data reveals a contrast between weak single-core performance, which falls in the bottom quartile, and average multi-core capabilities, which place in the middle 50% for stress-ng and PassMark tests. Memory bandwidth and database operations also perform at average levels. With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.n1.7xlarge is qualitatively structured for multi-threaded workloads that do not demand high single-thread velocity. It is best suited for parallel batch processing, static web serving, and distributed database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM. It offers average multi-core performance and is designed for parallel workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM, optimized for multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core compute instance designed for parallel processing and multi-threaded workloads requiring balanced memory bandwidth.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
Average multi-core performance and memory bandwidth benchmarks
No bundled local storage or GPU hardware
Suited for multi-threaded batch processing and web serving
